name: Death courier
short_description: In 2340. Earth ravaged, nearly destroyed. The last cities try to keep themselves alive and not starve. Hard times ahead. The roads to the other cities are destroyed, devastated or besieged by bandits.
detailed_description:
In the year 2340, Earth is dying.
Civilization hangs by a thread. The last surviving cities fight hunger, collapse, and the constant threat of violence. Roads between settlements have been shattered, swallowed by ruin, or taken over by ruthless bandits.

In a world where every delivery can mean survival, one role becomes more important than ever:

You are Postman 09.
A courier sent into the remains of humanity to carry vital parcels across a broken world.

What begins as a simple job quickly turns into a dangerous journey through desolate highways, abandoned outposts, and hostile territory. Every package matters. Every route is a risk. Every destination could be your last.

Deliver through the end of the world

Pick up your cargo, find your path, and bring each parcel safely to its destination. Travel across a devastated landscape where danger, isolation, and uncertainty follow every step.

Explore freely

The world of Death Courier is open for you to discover. Choose your own routes, venture into forgotten places, and decide how far you are willing to go in a dying world.

A bleak world brought to life

Built with Unreal Engine 4, Death Courier presents a striking post-apocalyptic atmosphere with detailed environments, sharp visuals, and rich colors that bring the ruins of Earth to life.

Features

  • Deliver parcels across a ruined future Earth

  • Explore an open world at your own pace

  • Travel through dangerous roads, broken cities, and abandoned zones

  • Experience a lonely atmospheric journey in a collapsing civilization

  • Discover a world where every delivery matters

The world is broken.
The cities are starving.
But someone still has to deliver.

Become Postman 09 in Death Courier.
